zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Talley於大約1700年出生在美國維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪時，她的父親Richard Talley16歲，母親Mary Lightfoot Tucker6歲。她於大約1716年與William Pettipoole在美國維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是14個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1753年10月在美國維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治普林斯 喬治享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Talley于大约1700年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪时，她的父亲Richard Talley16岁，母亲Mary Lightfoot Tucker6岁。她于大约1716年与William Pettipoole在美国弗吉尼亚州结婚。他们至少是14个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1753年10月在美国弗吉尼亚州普林斯 喬治普林斯 喬治享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Tolley  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of the places in northern France named Tailly (Somme, Ardennes). It is uncertain that this surname survived into modern times.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Taithligh ‘descendant of Taithleach’, a byname or personal name meaning ‘peaceable’. This surname is now very rare in Ireland.

variants.name: Tally
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Talley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tallie
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Talley  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland. In the US, it is found mainly among African Americans.

variants.name: Talty
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tailtigh ‘descendant of Tailteach’, a personal name which Woulfe believes to be a variant of Taithleach, a byname or personal name meaning ‘peaceable’ (see Talley ).

variants.name: Tolley
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Toli (Old Norse Tóli, a particularly East Scandinavian pet form of names in Thórr ‘the god Thor’ + an element beginning with l-).
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Russian Telyatev: nickname or metonymic occupational name derived from telyata ‘calves’.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Talley was born about 1700, in Charles City County, Virginia, United States, her father, Richard Talley, was 16 and her mother, Mary Lightfoot Tucker, was 6. She married William Pettipoole about 1716, in Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 14 sons and 3 daughters. She died in October 1753, in Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, United States, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Talley est née environ 1700, à Charles City County, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Richard Talley, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Mary Lightfoot Tucker, avait 6 ans. Elle a épousé William Pettipoole environ 1716, à Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 14 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1753, à Prince George, Prince George, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 54 ans.

Sie hat um 1716 in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten William Pettipoole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 14 Söhne und 3 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Talley è nata il circa 1700 nel Charles City County, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Richard Talley, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Mary Lightfoot Tucker, aveva 6 anni. Lei sposato William Pettipoole circa 1716, nel Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 14 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1753, nel Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Talleyが約1700年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイで生まれた時，父Richard Talleyは16歳，母Mary Lightfoot Tuckerは6歳であった。約1716年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州でWilliam Pettipooleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも14人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1753年10月にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州プリンス ジョーッジプリンス ジョーッジで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Talley(이)가 대략 1700년 미국 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Talley(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Lightfoot Tucker(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 대략 1716년 미국 버지니아 주에서 William Pettipoole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1753년 10월 미국 버지니아 주 프린스 조지 프린스 조지에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Talley nasceu aproximadamente 1700, em Charles City County, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Richard Talley, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Mary Lightfoot Tucker, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com William Pettipoole aproximadamente 1716, em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 14 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1753, em Prince George, Prince George, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Talley родилась около 1700 г. в местности чарльс сити коунти, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Richard Talley было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Lightfoot Tucker, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pettipoole около 1716 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла октябрь 1753 г. в местности принц джеордж, принц джеордж, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frances Talley nació aproximadamente 1700, en Charles City County, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Richard Talley, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Mary Lightfoot Tucker, tenía 6 años. Se casó con William Pettipoole aproximadamente 1716, en Virginia, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 14 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1753, en Prince George, Prince George, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 54 años.
